name: Now4real
description: Connect OpenClaw to Now4real pagechat via webhooks

botDisplayName.description: Display name shown for the bot when replying

botDisplayIcon.description: URL of the icon shown for the bot when replying

now4real.webhookAuthorization.label: Webhook Authorization
now4real.webhookAuthorization.help: Specify the value for the HTTP "Authorization" header to authenticate requests sent from the Now4real cloud to your webhook.

now4real.botDisplayName.label: Bot Display Name
now4real.botDisplayName.help: The name shown for the bot when it replies in the chat.

now4real.botDisplayIcon.label: Bot Display Icon
now4real.botDisplayIcon.help: URL of the avatar image shown for the bot when it replies in the chat.
